data.description: Welcome to the exclusive luxury of Tropic Isle! Enjoy waterfront living in the heart of Delray Beach. This estate offers 5 bedrooms, 5.5 baths, plus an office and an entertaining loft space.  Enter paradise with vaulted ceilings, expansive windows, and a gorgeous waterfront view from just about every room.  The chef's kitchen is complete with a butler's pantry, gas cooktop, new appliances, all overlooking an open style family room.  This fabulous home offers a triple split floor plan with the primary suite upstairs, while there are four other ensuite bedrooms all privately located.    Bring your dream yacht and enjoy 90 feet of dock space, only four homes in from the main intracoastal waterway.  You are evenly situated  between the Boca Inlet and the Boynton Beach Inlet. Some pix Virtual Don't miss this opportunity to live in the hottest community in South Florida, walking distance to shops, restaurants, the beach, and the famed Atlantic Avenue where you have paradise at your finger tips!
